cards.title: Termination
cards.governance_note: Define halt, failure, timeout, or handoff behavior before deployment.

cards.title: Invariants
cards.governance_note: Identify what must remain true across execution and state transitions.

cards.title: Edge Cases
cards.governance_note: Treat boundary cases as evidence about hidden assumptions.

cards.title: Counterexamples
cards.governance_note: Preserve failure cases as regression tests and governance records.
